name: Log Completed Spec Tasks
description: After a spec task is marked complete, log it to the context log so there's a running record of what's been built.

then.prompt:
A spec task was just completed. Append a brief entry to 'c:\Users\manni\OneDrive\Homebrew_dev\context-log.md' noting what was built, in the format:
- [DONE]: <task description> (spec: <feature-name>)

Add it under today's date section if one exists, or create a new dated section. Keep it to one line per task.
